rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex terminators or fixing syntax errors in AGREE contracts
Ensure all AGREE annexes are properly terminated with `};`
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE contracts to maintain traceability
Place AGREE contracts in the appropriate annex scope (component type or implementation) based on the context
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address the validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Ensure all AGREE contracts are syntactically correct and properly terminated
Use only visible identifiers in AGREE contracts to maintain traceability
Place AGREE contracts in the appropriate annex scope (component type or implementation) based on the context
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence, for example `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; instead, remove the invalid clause
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names; use `int`, `real`, and `bool` instead
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
